product_overview: Rekabetçi (Gym-Gamer) is a gamified fitness tracking web app that logs workouts, calculates ELO-based ranks from workout volume, and visualizes activity and rankings. It uses React (Vite) with Supabase for auth and persistence.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication and user sessions via Supabase.
Enable simple, repeatable workout logging and volume-based ELO calculation.
Visualize user activity and rank progression (heatmap and rank card).
Expose competitive features (leaderboard) and coach tools for assigning programs.
Keep components modular using context/hooks for maintainability and testability.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register and sign in using Supabase authentication so they can access protected features.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Click Login/Register button -> See successful login and redirect to /profile
Navigate to / -> Enter invalid credentials -> Click Login/Register button -> See authentication error message
Navigate to / -> Click Login/Register button without filling fields -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Workout Tracking
features.description: Let authenticated users select a daily routine, log sets/reps/weights for exercises, submit workouts, and view a session summary that contributes to ELO.
user_flows: Navigate to /workout -> Select daily routine -> Log sets, reps, and weights for an exercise -> Repeat logging for additional exercises -> Click Finish workout button -> See workout summary and updated ELO
Navigate to /workout -> Attempt to access without being authenticated -> See login required message and redirect to /

Navigate to /workout -> Select daily routine -> Enter invalid set/rep/weight values -> Click Finish workout button -> See validation error message -> Correct values -> Click Finish workout button -> See workout summary

features.name: Profile Activity & Rank
features.description: Show user's ELO score and rank tier and visualize workout history via an activity heatmap with drill-down into specific workout details.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> See ELO score and rank tier displayed on RankCard -> See activity calendar heatmap -> Click on heatmap day -> See workout details for that day
Navigate to /profile -> See no workout data for recent days -> See empty-state message and CTA to log a workout -> Click CTA -> Navigate to /workout
Navigate to /profile while unauthenticated -> See authentication required message and redirect to /

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: Display user rankings sorted by ELO so users can compare progress against others.
user_flows: Navigate to /leaderboard -> See list of users sorted by ELO with rank positions and ELO values -> Click on a user entry (if available) -> See public profile or rank details
Navigate to /leaderboard -> Network or server error when fetching leaderboard -> See error state with retry option -> Click retry -> Successfully load leaderboard
Navigate to /leaderboard while unauthenticated -> See authentication required message and redirect to /

features.name: Coach Panel
features.description: Provide coaches a protected interface to view assigned athletes and assign custom programs.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach -> Authenticate as coach (if required) -> See list of assigned athletes -> Select an athlete -> Assign custom program -> See confirmation of assignment
Navigate to /coach -> Attempt access as non-coach or unauthenticated user -> See access denied message or redirect to /
Navigate to /coach -> Open assign program dialog -> Submit program with missing fields -> See validation errors -> Complete fields -> Submit -> See success confirmation

routes.description: User profile dashboard with activity heatmap and rank card
Coach panel for custom program assignment

features.description: User login and registration via Supabase

features.name: Workout Tracking

user_interactions: Log sets, reps, and weights for exercises
